creator: caligula@primamail.de
text:
# portupgrade -aR
       ~snip~
cc -O2 -Wall  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -I/usr/include -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing   -DLUA_USE_POSIX -DLUA_USE_DLOPEN -I./liblinear -I./liblua -I/usr/local/include/lua51 -I./libdnet-stripped/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/include -I./nbase -I./nsock/include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DNMAP_NAME=\"Nmap\" -DNMAP_URL=\"http://nmap.org\" -DNMAP_PLATFORM=\"i386-portbld-freebsd7.4\" -DNMAPDATADIR=\"/usr/local/share/nmap\" -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -c -o liolib.o liolib.c

liolib.c:543: error: for each function it appears in.)
liolib.c:543: error: expected ';' before 'offset'
liolib.c:544: error: 'offset' undeclared (first use in this function)
